cookies_settings_analytics_desc.message: Analytics cookies help website to understand how visitors interact through the website. These cookies help to improve user experiences by collecting and reporting information. [Cookie Detail]

cookies_settings_marketing_desc.message: Marketing cookies are used to track visitors across websites to display relevant advertisements for the individual user and thereby more valuable for publishers and third party advertisers. [Cookie Detail]

cookies_settings_necessary_desc.message: Necessary cookies are required to help a website usable by enabling core functions and access to secure areas of the website. The website cannot be function properly without these cookies and they are enabled by default and cannot be disabled. [Cookie Detail]

crm_ai_insights_desc.message: AI scans your data 24/7 to deliver automatic recommendations on what action will improve growth or retention.

crm_assistant_desc.message: Save hours with AI that interprets plain-language requests to build, schedule, and enhance campaigns on your behalf.

crm_customer_profile_desc.message: Understand your customers better with a full overview of their behavior, spending, and engagement patterns.

crm_funnel_desc.message: Monitor the full customer journey and trigger targeted actions when users are inactive or ready to convert.

crm_grow_faster_desc.message: Manage your entire community with our Freedom Console

crm_segment_tracking_desc.message: Spot your most valuable, ready-to-buy, and inactive customers, and run targeted campaigns that drive results.

features_converted_referrals_desc.message: Expand your customer base through performance-based referrals that reward verified purchases and mission completions.

features_customer_support_desc.message: Resolve issues faster through integrated chat that connects customers to human or AI support in real time.

features_feed_desc.message: Broadcast important news, offers, and alerts straight into your users’ activity feed for real-time visibility.

features_loyalty_tokens_desc.message: Give your customers something worth earning. Launch your own tokens or points that can be redeemed or collected across your ecosystem.

features_missions_desc.message: Create consistent engagement loops through daily missions that inspire participation and reinforce loyalty behaviors.

features_payments_desc.message: Expand your payment capabilities with integrated support for cards, tokens, and loyalty systems, fully secure and compliant.

features_polls_desc.message: Test ideas, measure satisfaction, and identify trends fast with built-in polls and surveys.

features_pos_desc.message: Gain financial clarity with a dashboard that consolidates all sales and payment settlement activity in one place with Merchant Mode.

features_secure_checkout_desc.message: Reduce friction at the final step with a checkout process designed for speed, safety, and trust.

features_shop_desc.message: Reach customers everywhere. List and manage products or NFTs across multiple channels, including POS and in-app sales.

features_top_contribution_desc.message: Inspire your community to engage more by celebrating high-performing members through badges and rankings.

map_reach_explorers_desc.message: Tourists and explorers collect digital stamps as they travel. Featuring your business turns every visit into a collectible memory — promoting your brand to a global audience.

map_win_visibility_desc.message: Give your customers something worth earning. Launch your own tokens or points that can be redeemed or collected across your ecosystem.

success_bchf_desc.message: Through the Freedom World Impact program, the Bangkok Community Help Foundation leverages the Merchant System and QuickScan to transform donations into a seamless, secure, and transparent experience.

success_bchf_desc2.message: By linking donations to structured Missions and recognizing milestones with on-chain digital badges, the platform converts one-time contributions into a verifiable, high-engagement journey of personal impact.

success_buf_desc.message: To provide a loving home, education, and care for children, Baan Unrak empowers donors and volunteers to contribute to meaningful projects through Freedom World’s engagement-driven initiatives

success_fdrun_desc.message: Igniting a passionate community of running lovers from just a small group of runners from the Amazing Thailand Marathon 2023, the community has shown what a strong bond and shared enthusiasm can achieve. Their success was driven by:

success_fdrun_title.message:
thriving community fostered by
a shared passion

success_myst_desc.message: By integrating the Freedom World App, Mystic Valley transforms the traditional festival into a cutting-edge digital ecosystem where NFT tickets provide secure, collectible access, while MYST points streamline on-site transactions for a frictionless, cashless environment. This experience is further elevated through interactive Missions that gamify the venue, encouraging attendees to explore every stage and activation to earn exclusive rewards, effectively turning a passive viewing event into a deeply participatory and immersive journey.

success_onyx_desc.message: In the heart of RCA, ONYX is blending entertainment with digital innovation. Patrons top up ONYX Points, redeem rewards, and enjoy seamless QR payments. Missions and campaigns extend engagement beyond the dance floor, building loyalty with every beat.

success_raja_desc.message: Through the Freedom World ecosystem, Thailand’s leading ferry service transforms travel into a premium experience by driving engagement and loyalty via referral systems, RAJA points, and NFT e-vouchers. This digital integration streamlines the passenger journey while rewarding repeat travelers with a modern, interactive approach to maritime transit.

success_roon_desc.message: By embracing the Freedom World app, Roon Khanom Khai connects with customers in new ways, offering top-ups, missions, and special in-store deals that drive repeat visits and lasting loyalty.

success_seen_desc.message: Seenspace has transformed Thonglor 13’s lifestyle hub into a dynamic destination for shoppers and social explorers. The brand has created a delightful and rewarding shopping experience, turning their community into brand ambassadors using:

success_seen_title.message: gamified shopping experience boosting visits and repeat spending.

success_spip_desc.message: SPIP provided tamper-proof credentials for its students. Moreover, the program introduced a unique reward system using SPIP Points, offering students hands-on experience with innovative digital tools.

success_tat_desc.message: Freedom World and the Tourism of Thailand (TAT) have teamed up to embark travelers onto a unique journey where they can explore up to 80+ local businesses, enjoy special deals, and earn epic rewards.

success_topgolf_desc.message: Topgolf Thailand has implemented the top-up function, mission system, and merchant system through Freedom World to drive customer loyalty, enhance engagement, and boost retention within the Topgolf ecosystem.

success_topgolf_desc2.message: By adopting the Freedom App, Topgolf has elevated its customer journey by combining seamless payment experiences with interactive reward mechanisms — making every visit more convenient, engaging, and rewarding for its patrons, while encouraging repeat spending and deeper participation across its entertainment offerings.

success_topgolf_title.message: Rewarding Every Swing through A Seamless Loyalty Journey

success_tyk_desc.message: The authentic restaurant drives repeat visits, gains revenue, and fosters lasting connections with their loyal customers by leveraging interactive and rewarding activities, supported by Freedom World's:

why_will_freedom_everything_in_one_desc.message:
Save time and manage your business 
from a single, easy-to-use console.

why_will_freedom_know_your_customers_des.message: Use deep customer data to deliver personalized offers, exclusive content, and gamified experiences.

why_will_freedom_pay_less_desc.message: All the tools you need to grow your business – without breaking the bank.
